channel.title: Immersive on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Immersive on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Immersive AI: Transforming Reality with Intelligence and Interaction
item.description: Recently REA Cyber City hosted their annual flagship event Global TechFest 2026. I had the privilege of being invited as guest speaker along with prominent speakers there! During the session, I spoke on: “Immersive AI: Transforming Reality with Intelligence and Interaction” Session Highlights In my presentation, I explored how immersive intelligence is rapidly evolving around us — moving beyond virtual displays or simple digital overlays on the physical world. Today, we are witnessing the emergence of environments where AI understands context, space, and human interaction, enabling more natural and intelligent experiences.

item.title: Immersive AI at IPOS 2024: Transforming the Process Sector
item.description: IPOS 2024 was an inspiring technology summit focused on the innovations, digitalization, and disruptions shaping the downstream oil & gas, petrochemicals, fertilizers, and process manufacturing sectors. The event provided deep insights into operational excellence, optimization, Industry 4.0, sustainability, safety, and more. Hosted alongside the Digitalization & Automation Technology Summit and Expo (DATs 2024) by the Institute of Technological Excellence (ITEx), this summit brought together downstream industry leaders and technologists to exchange knowledge and ideas.
